title: grewia isochroa
intro: Grewia isochroa, a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, is native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and fever. The leaves and roots of Grewia isochroa have been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of diarrhea, dysentery, and cough, as well as to reduce inflammation and ease pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using the roots in a decoction to harness its health benefits.
